heading: The Azalea
body_1: A masterpiece of naval craftsmanship, Azalea was purpose-built for the Maldivian archipelago. Her shallow draft allows access to the most secluded lagoons, while her spacious decks and refined interiors ensure your comfort never wavers.
body_2: Accommodating up to eight guests in four elegantly appointed cabins, every inch of Azalea reflects our commitment to providing an unparalleled experience at sea.
